doc_title_en: Notice of Change in Dividend Policy (Introduction of Progressive Dividend and DOE Target) and Dividend Increase

key_facts.reason_jp: 資本効率を意識した積極的な株主還元、長期的かつ安定的な利益還元を明確化

summary_en: 18 yen/share for FY3/26 (up 3 yen from prior forecast of 15 yen); prior year 14 yen. New policy: progressive dividend (no cuts absent major events) with DOE target 4.0%. FY3/27 forecast 19 yen/share (8 yen interim + 11 yen year-end). Effective from FY3/26.
summary_jp: FY3/26配当18円/株（前回予想15円から3円増）、前期14円。新方針：DOE目標4.0%を伴う累進配当（原則減配なし）。FY3/27予想19円/株（中間8円+期末11円）。FY3/26より適用。
tag_en: Dividend Hike – 18 yen/share (FY3/26) + Progressive Dividend + DOE 4.0% target
tag_jp: 増配 – 18円/株（FY3/26）+ 累進配当 + DOE 4.0%目標
